name: Mixed Vegetable Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 small Green papaya, seeded and julienned
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large salad bowl, arrange the lettuce, cucumber, papaya, tomatoes, green onions, cilantro, peanuts, and red chilies in layers.
2. In a small bowl, mix together the lime juice, soy sauce, sugar, and red chilies.
3. Pour the dressing over the layered vegetables.
4. Toss gently to combine all ingredients.
5. Serve immediately.
